title: Centralize ALL advisor policy into .evolve/policy.json (advisor block) + evolve config reload
description:
DESIGN-REVIEW VERDICT (2026-07-02, user-approved): the operator CAN set every advisor dimension, but the config surface is FRAGMENTED across two files/loaders and the docs lie about the source. Centralize into the one operator SSOT (.evolve/policy.json) with per-cycle reload semantics + an explicit reload trigger.

CURRENT STATE (verified file:line):
- Advisor AUTHORITY axes live in docs/architecture/phase-registry.json config{}: dynamic_routing=advisory, routing_mode=llm, model_routing=auto — read by config.Load(registryPath) at the composition root (cmd/evolve/cmd_cycle.go:294-295). EVOLVE_DYNAMIC_ROUTING env overrides (config.go:592).
- Advisor EXECUTION lives in .evolve/policy.json router{} (policy.go:848 RouterPolicy: router_replan, routing_judge, recon_digest, replan_depth, plan_model, propose_model, cli, model) + pins{} — read by the SEPARATE policy.Load (cmd_cycle.go:310).
- DOC DRIFT (fix as part of this work): config.go:294/:598/:600 comments claim model_routing comes from .evolve/policy.json — the code actually reads it from phase-registry.json. Comments must match the NEW reality after centralization.
- NO reload trigger exists: config/policy are re-read once per cycle at the composition root; there is no `evolve config` subcommand, no SIGHUP handler, no watcher.

REQUIRED DESIGN (user-approved decisions):
1. ADVISOR BLOCK: add `advisor` to .evolve/policy.json schema (policy.go Policy struct) holding the authority axes: dynamic_routing (off|shadow|advisory|enforce), routing_mode (llm|static), model_routing (static|advisory|auto). Keep router{} as the execution sub-block beside it OR fold as advisor.router — pick ONE shape, no duplication; migration must accept the legacy router{} key with a deprecation WARN.
2. PRECEDENCE at the composition root (ONE merge point, no second config-reading path): env (EVOLVE_DYNAMIC_ROUTING, existing contract) > policy.json advisor{} > phase-registry.json config{} (structural fallback, keeps fresh-clone defaults) > compiled defaults. config.Load grows a policy-overlay parameter (or a small merge step in cmd_cycle.go) — policy stays loaded ONCE by policy.Load; do NOT make config.Load re-read policy.json itself (single-reader per file).
3. KEEP in phase-registry.json (NOT operator policy — structural state machine): spine_order, legal_successors, mandatory_phases floor, per-phase entries. ValidateSafetyInvariants keeps hard-failing unsafe edits.
4. RELOAD SEMANTICS (user choice: per-cycle + explicit trigger): config remains IMMUTABLE per cycle (no mid-phase mutation). New `evolve config reload` subcommand: validates .evolve/policy.json + the merged effective config NOW, reports the effective advisor policy (and diffs vs the running batch's), and stages it so the NEXT cycle boundary picks it up (per-cycle re-read already does the pickup — the command's value is VALIDATE + ECHO + explicit operator affordance). A malformed policy at reload must be rejected loudly WITHOUT breaking the running batch.
5. `evolve config show` (or reload --dry-run): print the EFFECTIVE merged advisor policy with the SOURCE of each value (env/policy/registry/default) — the operator-facing single pane of glass.

CONSTRAINTS: strict TDD red-first; config-driven, zero new env flags; single-source-with-projection; every new exported symbol named in a _test.go AST (apicover -enforce); go test -race green; byte-identical behavior for an operator whose policy.json has no advisor block (registry fallback keeps today's values); update docs/architecture/control-flags.md + runtime-reference.md + the wrong config.go comments.

ACCEPTANCE:
- .evolve/policy.json advisor{dynamic_routing,routing_mode,model_routing} overrides phase-registry.json config{} (test proves precedence order incl. env-beats-policy).
- Legacy router{} still parses (deprecation WARN test).
- Absent advisor block => byte-identical RoutingConfig to today (golden test).
- `evolve config reload` validates + echoes effective policy with per-value source; malformed policy rejected loudly, batch unharmed; next cycle picks up the change (integration test at the cycle boundary).
- config.go:294/:598/:600 comments corrected. apicover -enforce + go test -race clean on touched packages.
